rules.rule_text:
title: Remote PowerShell Session Host Process (WinRM)
id: 734f8d9b-42b8-41b2-bcf5-abaf49d5a3c8
status: test
description: Detects remote PowerShell sections by monitoring for wsmprovhost (WinRM
  host process) as a parent or child process (sign of an active PowerShell remote
  session).
references:
- https://threathunterplaybook.com/hunts/windows/190511-RemotePwshExecution/notebook.html
author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
date: 2019-09-12
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.lateral-movement
- attack.t1059.001
- attack.t1021.006
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
  - Image|endswith: \wsmprovhost.exe
  - ParentImage|endswith: \wsmprovhost.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate usage of remote Powershell, e.g. for monitoring purposes.
level: medium
